search:docker+security:docker security b.content:
- **CLI Commands**:
  - `docker build --no-cache`: Build an image without using cache.
  - `docker run --rm`: Automatically remove the container when it exits.
  - `docker pull --disable-content-trust=false`: Disable content trust for pulling images.

- **Latest Versions**:
  - Docker Engine: Ensure you are using the latest stable version to benefit from security patches and improvements.

- **Key Config Options**:
  - Use non-root users in containers (`USER` directive).
  - Limit container privileges with `--cap-drop`.
  - Mount volumes securely, avoiding world-writable permissions.
  - Configure network settings to minimize exposure.

search:docker+security:docker image scan.content:
- **Trivy**: 
  - Command: `trivy image <image_name>`
  - Flags: `--format json`, `--severity HIGH,CRITICAL`
  - Latest Version: v0.36.0

- **Grype**:
  - Command: `grype <image_name>`
  - Flags: `--json`, `--vulnerability-type os,library`
  - Latest Version: v1.24.0

- **Clair**:
  - Command: `clairctl scan <image_name>`
  - Flags: `--format json`, `--severity HIGH,CRITICAL`
  - Latest Version: v3.5.0

- **Snyk Container**:
  - Command: `snyk container test <image_name>`
  - Flags: `--json`, `--severity CRITICAL,HIGH`
  - Latest Version: v1.489.0

- **Aqua Microscanner**:
  - Command: `aqua microscanner scan <image_name>`
  - Flags: `--format json`, `--severity HIGH,CRITICAL`
  - Latest Version: v2.3.0

- **DockerScan (cr0hn)**:
  - Command: `docker-scan --image <image_name>`
  - Flags: `--json`, `--vulnerability-type os,library`
  - Latest Version: v2.1.0

- **Trivy**: 
  - **CLI Command**: `trivy image <image_name>`
  - **Latest Version**: Check [GitHub](https://github.com/aquasecurity/trivy/releases)
  - **Key Config Options**: `--severity` (e.g., `--severity HIGH,CRITICAL`), `--format json`

- **Clair**:
  - **CLI Command**: `clairctl scan <image_name>`
  - **Latest Version**: Check [GitHub](https://github.com/quay/clairctl/releases)
  - **Key Config Options**: `--clair-url`, `--output json`

- **Syft**:
  - **CLI Command**: `syft image <image_name> --json`
  - **Latest Version**: Check [GitHub](https://github.com/anchore/syft/releases)
  - **Key Config Options**: `--format json`, `--output file`

- **Trivy GitHub Actions**:
  - **Action File**: `.github/workflows/trivy.yml`
  - **Example Configuration**:
    ```yaml
    name: Trivy Scan

    on:
      push:
        branches: [ main ]

    jobs:
      scan:
        runs-on: ubuntu-latest

        steps:
          - uses: actions/checkout@v2
          - name: Set up Docker Buildx
            id: buildx
            uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v1
          - name: Login to Docker Hub
            uses: docker/login-action@v1
            with:
              username: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_USERNAME }}
              password: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_PASSWORD }}
          - name: Build and scan image
            run: |
              docker build . --tag my-image:latest
              trivy image my-image:latest --format json > report.json
    ```

- **Clair GitHub Actions**:
  - **Action File**: `.github/workflows/clair.yml`
  - **Example Configuration**:
    ```yaml
    name: Clair Scan

    on:
      push:
        branches: [ main ]

    jobs:
      scan:
        runs-on: ubuntu-latest

        steps:
          - uses: actions/checkout@v2
          - name: Set up Docker Buildx
            id: buildx
            uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v1
          - name: Login to Docker Hub
            uses: docker/login-action@v1
            with:
              username: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_USERNAME }}
              password: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_PASSWORD }}
          - name: Build and scan image
            run: |
              docker build . --tag my-image:latest
              clairctl scan my-image:latest --clair-url http://clair-server:6060 --output json > report.json
    ```

- **Syft GitHub Actions**:
  - **Action File**: `.github/workflows/syft.yml`
  - **Example Configuration**:
    ```yaml
    name: Syft Scan

    on:
      push:
        branches: [ main ]

    jobs:
      scan:
        runs-on: ubuntu-latest

        steps:
          - uses: actions/checkout@v2
          - name: Set up Docker Buildx
            id: buildx
            uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v1
          - name: Login to Docker Hub
            uses: docker/login-action@v1
            with:
              username: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_USERNAME }}
              password: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_PASSWORD }}
          - name: Build and scan image
            run: |
              docker build . --tag my-image:latest
              syft image my-image:latest --format json > report.json
    ```
